% ref: claim_3_1 (statement)
% title: JNodeProperties
\def\rowref{claim\_3\_1}
\phantomsection\label{claim_3_1}

\begin{Rem}[JNodeProperties]
With the notations \refrow{def_3_2} the restrictions in definition \refrow{def_3_1} mean that the nodes $j \in J$ will not have any arrowheads pointing towards them: $ j \hus v \notin G$. Nodes $j \in J$ can only point towards nodes $v \in V$: edges $j \tuh v$ are allowed. Furthermore, no two nodes in $J$ are adjacent.
\end{Rem}
